about.title: About us
about.description: The Python Catania community was born in 2023 from a group of enthusiasts of the Python language who live and work in the Catania area. We are part of the national Python Italia community and we love to call ourselves the Pycciotti. 🌋

callForSpeakers.title: Call for Speakers
callForSpeakers.description: Got an idea, a project or an experience to share? Getting on stage is easier than you think. Our community welcomes talks at every level: from personal side-project stories to deep technical dives.

hero.title: Python Catania 🐘🌋
hero.tagline: The right place to meet Python language enthusiasts from Catania.

nextMeetup.title: Next Meetup
nextMeetup.description: We organise regular meetups to share knowledge, experiences and passion for Python. Everyone is welcome, from beginners to experts.
